name: Madeera the Covenant
title: First Manifestation of Law
description: Madeera was the first manifestation of Law. She carries every law of reality, a dictate called the Covenant, written on her skin in precise symbols.

name: Saint Terragnis
title: Patron of Lawful Humans
description: A legendary knight who is the patron of most lawful humans. She ascended to godhood long ago and is the embodiment of righteousness and justice.

name: Freya
title: Lady of Fire
description: Goddess of fertility and love.

name: Gede
title: God of Feasts and the Wilds
description: The god of feasts, mirth, and the wilds. Gede is usually peaceful, but primal storms rage when her anger rises. Many elves and halflings worship her.

name: Oghma
title: The Binder
description: God of knowledge, speech and writing.

name: Ord
title: The Unbending, The Wise, The Secret-Keeper
description: Ord the Unbending, the Wise, the Secret-Keeper. He is the god of magic, knowledge, secrets, and equilibrium.

name: Silvanus
title: The Oakfather
description: God of wild nature and forests.

name: Gruumsh
title: The Ruiner
description: Orc god of slaughter, warfare, and destruction.

name: Kytheros
title: God of Time
description: The Lord of Time, the one who perceives all possible futures. Kytheros aims for the fulfillment of all destinies as they should be.

patron_gifts.effect: Once per day, force the DM to redo a single roll.
Gain +1 to your AC from a supernatural foresight.
+2 to the Strength, Dexterity, or Wisdom attribute.
Three times per day, add your Wisdom bonus to a roll (roll again if repeated).
Choose one option, or 2 points to distribute among the attributes.

name: Lolth
title: The Spider Queen
description: Drow goddess of spiders and deceit.

name: Memnon
title: First Manifestation of Chaos
description: Memnon was the first manifestation of Chaos. He is Madeera's twin, a red-maned, leonine being whose ultimate ambition is to rend the cosmic laws of the Covenant from his sister's skin.

name: Ramlaat
title: The Pillager, The Barbaric, The Horde
description: Ramlaat is the Pillager, the Barbaric, the Horde. Many orcs worship him and live by the Blood Rite, a prophecy that says only the strongest will survive a coming doom.

name: Shune the Vile
title: The Mother Witch
description: Shune whispers arcane secrets to sorcerers and witches who call to her in the dark hours. She schemes to displace Ord so she can control the vast flow of magic herself. She communicates with her offspring through the flickering of candle flames and the clinking of dried herbs. Shune seeks hidden secrets and lost legends.

patron_gifts.effect: 1/day, teleport up to Far (visible location) with your movement.
+1 to melee or ranged attacks.
+2 to the Strength or Dexterity attribute.
1/day, force an Adjacent being to test the moral, even if it is immune.
Choose one option, or 2 points to distribute among the attributes.

name: The Lost
title: The Forbidden, The Forgotten
description: Two of The Nine are lost to the ages, their names expunged from history and memory. Yet their whispered legend lives on in ancient texts and forgotten places.

name: Avandra
title: The Change Bringer
description: Goddess of change, freedom, good fortune, and luck.

name: Berronar Truesilver
title: The Revered Mother
description: Dwarven goddess of hearth and home.

name: Chauntea
title: The Grain Mother
description: Goddess of agriculture.

name: Corellon Larethian
title: The Arch Heart
description: Elven god of art and magic.

name: Haela Brightaxe
title: The Luckmaiden
description: Dwarven goddess of war-luck. She is known to take great risks in battle, fight without hesitation, and support dwarves who also do so.

name: Kord
title: The Storm Lord
description: God of battle, competition, athletics, sport, and storms.

name: Mielikki
title: The Forest Queen
description: Goddess of forests and nature.

name: Selûne
title: The Moonmaiden
description: Goddess of the moon. Her teachings of compassion and guidance are popular with those striving under moon light. Aka The Triple Goddess (including Eilistraee and Hecate).

name: Torm
title: The Loyal Fury
description: God of courage and self-sacrifice. Torm sees Tyr as a father figure, and Ilmater as a brother in arms.

name: Tymora
title: Lady Luck
description: Goddess of good fortune.

name: Tyr
title: The Evenhanded
description: God of justice, courage and strategy. An ancient god known on many worlds for bringing justice to the oppressed.

name: Eilistraee
title: Dark Maiden
description: Drow goddess of beauty, dance, song, and moonlight. Aka The Triple Goddess.

name: Eldath
title: The Quiet One
description: Goddess of peace.

name: Erathis
title: The Law Bearer
description: Goddess of civilization, peace, and invention.

name: Gond
title: Wonderbringer
description: God of craft.

name: Helm
title: The Watcher
description: God of protection and watchfulness.

name: Jergel
title: The Pitiless One
description: Scribe of the dead.

name: Mask
title: The Lord of All Shadows
description: Goddess of thieves.

name: Mystra
title: The Lady of Mysteries
description: Goddess of magic.

name: Raven Queen
title: Nickname
description: Goddess of death, fate, and winter.

name: Tempus
title: The Foehammer
description: God of war.

name: Waukeen
title: The Coinmaiden
description: Goddess of trade and merchants.

name: Almazzat
title: The Wolf-Headed Archdemon
description: An archdemon with a wolf's head, six eyes, and six horns. Almazzat seeks to take the Sands of Eras from his father, Kytheros.

patron_gifts.effect: 1/day, gain Advantage on melee attacks for 3 rounds.
Learn to use 1 melee weapon or +1 on melee attacks.
+2 to Strength or Constitution, or +1 to melee damage.
Gain Advantage on initiative rolls (roll again if repeated).
Choose one option, or 2 points to distribute among the attributes.

name: Asmodeus
title: The Lord of the Nine Hells
description: Archdevil god of indulgence, domination and tyranny. One of the most powerful beings in the multiverse, Asmodeus, is not content to just rule the Hells, but seeks to rule over all of existence, as well. He loves tempting mortals through the "seven deadly sins" of mankind.

name: Belphegor
title: The Dark Prodigy
description: Belphegor is the daughter of Asmodeus, and an unpredictable archdevil succubi with her own agenda, known for her subversiveness. The "Princess of the Nine Hells," is one of the most hated by other devil rulers, including her part-time lover, Mammon. She also enjoys toying with mortals.

name: Beshaba
title: Lady Doom
description: Goddess of bad luck.

name: Hecate
title: Dread Goddess of Night
description: Goddess of magic and the moon. Aka The Triple Goddess (with Eilistraee and Selûne).

name: Iggwilv
title: The Witch Queen
description: Iggwilv was once a famous wizard called Tasha. The child of Baba Yaga, Iggwilv was the mother of god Iuz, with her demon lover Grazz't. She seeks hidden secrets and lost lore.

name: Iuz
title: The Old, Wicked One
description: God of pain and oppression. Half cambion son of Iggwilv and Grazzt.

name: Jubilex
title: Lord of Ooze
description: The disgusting Lord of Ooze leaks between the cracks in memory and the darkness between the stars. Jubilex seeks "the Dissolution" of all physical form.

patron_gifts.effect: Once per day, transform into a crawling puddle of slime for 3 rounds.
Maximize 2 rolls of life dice (previous or future).
+2 to the Dexterity or Constitution attribute.
Become immune to acid, cold, or poison (roll again upon acquiring all).
Choose one option, or 2 points to distribute among the attributes.

name: Malar
title: The Beastlord
description: God of the hunt. He hunts on the Prime Material Plane.

name: Myrkul
title: The Lord of Bones
description: God of death.

name: Surtur
title: Lord of the Fire Giants
description: God of fire giants.

name: The Willow-Man
title: The Ghostly Watcher
description: An elongated and ghostly being that wanders through the misty forests and watches everything from the threshold of nightmares. The Willow-Man seeks fear.

patron_gifts.effect: 1/day, hypnotize a creature of CR 5 or lower for 3 rounds.
Learn to use a longbow or +1 in ranged attacks.
+2 to the Dexterity or Charisma attribute.
Hostile spells that target you are always Difficult to cast.
Choose one option, or 2 points to distribute among the attributes.

name: Tiamat
title: The Scaled Tyrant
description: Dragon goddess of wealth, greed, vengeance, and evil.

name: Titania
title: Faerie Queen
description: The fickle archfey Faerie Queen of the Fey who views all of existence as a whimsical dream with hidden meaning and poignant drama. Titania seeks mischief, beauty, and artistry.

patron_gifts.effect: 1/day, read the mind of a creature you touch for 3 rounds.
Learn 1 wizard spell, level = 1/2 of your level. Cast it with INT.
+2 to the Dexterity or Intelligence attribute.
+1 XP whenever you learn a valuable or significant secret.
Choose one option, or 2 points to distribute among the attributes.

name: Vecna
title: The Whispered One
description: Lich god of evil secrets and necromancy. He often stalks nightmares. He seeks secrets of time, and offers power to those who can get them.
